name: @inline-chat/hermes-agent-adapter
description: Hermes Agent platform adapter for Inline, with a native Python plugin and bundled Inline realtime sidecar.

scripts.build: mkdir -p plugin/inline/sidecar && bun build ./src/install.ts --outdir dist --entry-naming '[name].js' --target=node --format=esm --packages=bundle && bun build ./src/sidecar/index.ts --outdir plugin/inline/sidecar --entry-naming 'index.mjs' --target=node --format=esm --packages=bundle && tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly
scripts.lint: bunx oxlint --ignore-path ../.oxlintignore scripts/release-stage.mjs src/install.ts src/sidecar/contract.ts src/sidecar/index.ts tests/adapter-python.test.ts tests/install.test.ts tests/package-artifact.test.ts tests/sidecar-contract.test.ts tests/sidecar-runtime.test.ts vitest.config.ts
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test
